name: InfisicalSecrets
description: Fetch secrets from Infisical and expose them as pipeline variables.
helpMarkDown: Fetches secrets from an Infisical project using the configured Infisical service connection. Each secret is exposed as a secret pipeline variable for subsequent steps.
author: infisical

inputs.name: infisicalConnection
inputs.label: Infisical service connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Service connection that points at your Infisical instance.

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure subscription (OIDC only)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure Resource Manager service connection used to mint a federated OIDC token. Required only when the selected Infisical service connection uses the OIDC authentication scheme. The Azure service connection must be configured with Workload Identity Federation.

inputs.name: identityId
inputs.label: Infisical identity ID (OIDC only)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Infisical machine identity ID to authenticate as. Required only when the Infisical service connection uses the OIDC scheme.

inputs.name: projectId
inputs.label: Project ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Infisical project (workspace) ID. Found in Project Settings → General.

inputs.name: secretPath
inputs.label: Secret path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Folder path within the environment. Defaults to /.
